description: A clickable news article teaser card showing a thumbnail image, headline, summary text, publication date, and optional news source attribution.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: News teaser with image, title, summary and date

props.imageAlt: women walking outside by the canal
props.title: New research reveals link between air pollution and water quality and people having multiple long term chronic conditions
props.summary: Research from the Healthy Lifespan Institute has identified a new link between air pollution and water quality with multimorbidity.

stories.name: NoImage
stories.description: News teaser without a thumbnail image

props.title: Green Brain at Discovery Night for the Kick off of British Science Week
props.summary: The Green Brain team hosted the "Bee-Hind a Bee Mind" booth for a second time at Discovery Night.

stories.name: WithNewsSrc
stories.description: News teaser with an external news source attribution

props.title: Take part in a research study on scans and scanxiety experiences of adults with mesothelioma, pancreatic, brain and liver cancer
props.summary: The online survey to gain insights to the experiences of scans for adults with mesothelioma, pancreatic, brain and liver cancer is now open.

stories.name: ExternalLink
stories.description: News teaser linking to an external page, opening in a new tab

props.title: Green Brain at Discovery Night for the Kick off of British Science Week
props.summary: The Green Brain team hosted the "Bee-Hind a Bee Mind" booth for a second time at Discovery Night.

stories.name: Group
stories.description: A typical news listing showing multiple teasers

instances.imageAlt: PhD students working together at computer
instances.title: Funded PhD Opportunities in the School of English
instances.summary: The School of English at the University of Sheffield is pleased to advertise three PhD projects funded by the Champernowne Trust and the bequest of Sheffield theatre director Geoffrey Ost.

instances.imageAlt: (LtoR) Founders Edward George and William Toms
instances.title: From bedroom to boardroom: enterprising student duo set up thriving Sheffield business
instances.summary: An entrepreneurial student duo has built their fledgling engineering firm from a bedroom startup to a full-scale city centre operation.

instances.imageAlt: Two young women smiling at the camera standing in front of a nature poster
instances.title: "Don't shy away from difficult topics"
instances.summary: Congratulations to Beth Tasker and Sophie Moss, winners of the Anglo-Netherlands Society Annual Award 2023.

notes: The root element is the anchor tag with class 'news-teaser-link' that wraps the inner '.news-teaser' div. The '.teaser-thumb' div may be empty when no image is available. The '.news-src' span sometimes contains an icon element (fas fa-external-link-alt) alongside the source text — model the text content only as a string prop; the icon is hardcoded. The NewsDate atom handles the date/time rendering inside '.news-date span'.
